title: Outlook integration: each reply creates a new item
excerpt: Hi. I have a board integrated with my Outlook to create an item when a new email is received. I also installed the Emails & Activities app to be able to reply to those emails (like a ticketing system). This all works as …

posts.author: nksse (Neil Kirk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I have a board integrated with my Outlook to create an item when a new email is received. I also installed the Emails & Activities app to be able to reply to those emails (like a ticketing system). This all works as expected: the email thread being logged and updated all within one item.

However, each user reply is also creating a new item. In the screenshot you can see the original item selected, which has the full email thread in the Emails & Activities. But it also has two new items, one for each of the users replies:

image1482×777 86.5 KB

These items are erroneous. How can I prevent replies from opening new items?

posts.author: Parul (Parul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I am also trying to create a ticketing system, can you please help me with steps you followed.

Were you able to find a solution to above problem?

posts.author: Jazmin (Jazmin Zhao)
posts.cookedHtml: Encontering the same problem ans looking for a solution.

posts.author: rsroose (Ryan Roose)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also having this issue. Has anyone found a fix?
